news.headline: D-Wave to showcase real-world quantum computing applications at Q2B24 Silicon Valley. Murray Thom to discuss quantum evolution.
news.summary: D-Wave Quantum Inc., a renowned quantum computing company, revealed plans to showcase the benefits of quantum optimization for modern businesses at Q2B24 Silicon Valley. As the first commercial provider of quantum computers globally, the firm will emphasize the significant role of quantum technology in today's industries. Murray Thom, the Vice President of Quantum Technology Evangelism at D-Wave, will be a key speaker at the event, discussing the progression of quantum applications. This event will provide invaluable insights into the potential of quantum computing with its noteworthy impact on businesses.

news.headline: Chronicle of Higher Education introduces AI assistant "Chron" for higher-eds. Powered by AI, it answers education-related queries.
news.summary: In Washington, a new AI-powered research assistant has been launched by The Chronicle of Higher Education to address important inquiries about higher education. This technological innovation aims to provide valuable insights and information on the subject matter.

news.headline: Autire introduces first audit solution with Automated Risk Assessment to CPA industry, transforming 401(k) audit compliance.
news.summary: In Dallas, Autire has announced the launch of Automated Risk Assessment for the CPA sector. This feature is now part of the industry's sole end-to-end EBP auditing solution, which is fully automated and adheres to standards.

news.headline: ABBYY named Technology Leader by QKS Group for 4th year in a row due to using AI to solve complex document processing.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, ABBYY has been acknowledged as a Technology Leader for its innovative utilization of specialized AI technology in addressing intricate document processing requirements.

news.headline: Pulsate introduces Opportunities Engine™ for financial institutions to boost revenue in the digital channel. #digitalbanking #finance
news.summary: Dublin-based company Pulsate has introduced its Opportunities Engine™ as part of its digital engagement platform for financial institutions. This new feature aims to enhance mobile-first engagement solutions and help deepen relationships with customers in moments of need. The Opportunities Engine™ is designed to not only drive digital engagement but also boost deposits and generate revenue through the digital channel. This release is expected to significantly impact financial institutions seeking to capitalize on digital opportunities.

news.headline: Citizens First Bank partners with WaveCX for digital engagement and training, improving operations and enhancing customer experience.
news.summary: In Omaha, Nebraska, WaveCX, a company specializing in personalized digital product engagement solutions for financial institutions, revealed that Citizens First Bank has opted to utilize WaveCX's services to revamp the way the bank conducts customer-facing demos and internal training programs. Through WaveCX's extensive features and demo options, the bank aims to enhance operational efficiency and boost employee and customer interaction. Citizens First Bank seeks to stand out in service quality.

news.headline: SIXT opens 50th airport location at John Wayne Airport, part of its U.S. expansion with 50 airport locations nationwide.
news.summary: SIXT USA, a subsidiary of Sixt SE, a prominent provider of premium mobility services worldwide, has revealed the inauguration of its 50th airport branch in the U.S. at John Wayne Airport (SNA) in Orange County, California. Orange County is situated within the expansive Los Angeles metropolitan area and stands as the third most populous county in the state. This achievement signifies a significant milestone in the company's substantial growth within the United States, as SIXT currently caters to 50 key airports across the nation.

news.headline: Digital claims process satisfaction rises as insurers add features to apps, says J.D. Power. Good news for customers.
news.summary: In Troy, Michigan, recent data by J.D. Power indicates a substantial increase in customer satisfaction with the digital claims process. This surge comes as insurance carriers continue to enhance their mobile applications with new features. The improvements have led to a notable rise in overall satisfaction levels among customers interacting with digital claims. The strong push towards digitalization reflects a strategic move by insurance companies to adapt to changing consumer preferences. This shift has been well-received, with customer satisfaction metrics showing a marked improvement.

news.headline: Amtech Systems to reveal Q4 & FY 2024 financial results on Dec 9, 2024, after market close with a 5:00 pm ET conference call. CEO Daigle will discuss.
news.summary: Amtech Systems Inc., a leading manufacturer of equipment and consumables for semiconductor production and packaging, is set to reveal its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 ending on September 30, 2024. The announcement is scheduled for Monday, December 9, 2024, post-market closure. Following this disclosure, a conference call will be held at 5:00 pm ET on the same day to delve into these results. During the call, Robert Daigle, the Chief Executive Officer, and Wade Jenke, the Chief Operating Officer, will provide insights and address queries. As a publicly traded company listed on the NASDAQ under “ASYS,” Amtech’s financial performance is of significant interest to investors and analysts.

news.headline: Laser Photonics Corp. (NASDAQ: LASE) expands product line for chip fabrication due to surging market demand.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, Laser Photonics Corporation (NASDAQ: LASE), a prominent developer of industrial laser systems for cleaning and material processing, revealed its plans to expand its product range to meet the increasing demand in the chip fabrication market. With the electronics and electric vehicle markets booming, alongside the growth in industrial automation and widespread adoption of AI technology, there is a need for innovative solutions. This move is part of LPC's strategy to capitalize on this market trend and cater to the evolving technology landscape.

news.headline: Prepare your facility for winter with BradyPLUS care tips to ensure safety in harsh weather. From GLENVIEW, Ill., Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: BradyPLUS recently shared vital facility care advice to ensure a safe and healthy winter season in the city of GLENVIEW. With the date set at December 3, 2024, the organization emphasized the significance of readiness as the nation braces for potentially severe winter weather. Facility maintenance teams were urged to take proactive measures to safeguard structures and inhabitants against the elements.

news.headline: Vale Base Metals finishes Voisey's Bay transition to underground mining, spending $2.94B to boost nickel production to 45 ktpy.
news.summary: In northern Labrador, Vale Base Metals has successfully finished the construction and commissioning of the Voisey's Bay Mine Expansion Project, a significant achievement that required an investment of US$2.94 billion. This project will substantially boost nickel production in concentrate to 45,000 tonnes annually (45 ktpy).

news.headline: First Mining Gold Corp. obtains positive federal conformity determination for Springpole Gold Project's final environmental impact statement from IAAC.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on December 3, 2024, First Mining Gold Corp. (TSX: FF, OTCQX: FFMGF, FRANKFURT: FMG) has received approval from the Impact Assessment Agency of Canada ("IAAC"). This approval marks a significant milestone for the company as they move forward with their projects.

news.headline: Bradford White donates $50,000 to expand ECA heat pump internship program for plumbing and HVACR technicians.
news.summary: A manufacturer known for its reliability has made a generous contribution of $50,000 towards expanding training programs to support the development of future plumbing and HVACR technicians. The company, based in AMBLER, Pa., is Bradford White Corporation, renowned for its production of water heaters, boilers, and storage tanks. The donation will aim to boost training opportunities and foster the growth of the upcoming generation of technicians in the industry.

news.headline: Greenstein & Milbauer, LLP in NYC helps victims of negligence, secures compensation for ceiling collapse victims.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Greenstein & Milbauer, LLP, a leading personal injury law firm in New York City, is dedicated to empowering victims of negligence and ensuring justice for affected individuals in New York. The firm has a proven track record of success in achieving positive outcomes for clients, including significant monetary compensation and legal remedies. With a focus on providing high-quality legal representation, Greenstein & Milbauer, LLP has helped numerous individuals recover damages, with millions of dollars secured in settlements and court awards.

news.headline: Lexie Hearing named to Inc.'s 2024 Health Products Best in Business list, recognizing industry-leading companies.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 3, 2024, it was disclosed that Lexie Hearing has secured a spot on Inc.'s prestigious 2024 Best in Business list in the Health Products sector. Every year, Inc. releases this list to honor top-performing companies that excel in their respective industries. This recognition highlights Lexie Hearing's exceptional expertise and success in the field.

news.headline: FSi Strategies named to Inc.'s 2024 Best in Business List for IT Management. Recognized for outstanding contributions and industry innovation in Vienna, VA.
news.summary: FSi Strategies, based in Vienna, Virginia, is proud to share that it has been recognized for its exceptional performance in IT management and industry innovation. The company has been named on the highly esteemed Inc. 2024 Best in Business list in the IT Management section. This acknowledgment highlights FSi Strategies' significant contributions within the sector. The recognition was announced on December 3, 2024, signifying a noteworthy achievement for the company.

news.headline: Workiz launches Genius Answering AI service to transform field service management. Over 120,000 customers benefit.
news.summary: A prominent field service software is boosting businesses with the help of AI dispatcher named Jessica. Recently in San Diego on December 3, 2024, Workiz, the top field service management platform, revealed the release of its latest AI service called Genius Answering. With more than 120,000 customers, Workiz continues to innovate and provide advanced solutions to enhance the field service industry.

news.headline: Bitcoin declared 'dead' 477 times, last in April 2021 by investor Rafi Farber, suggesting it has peaked.
news.summary: Bitcoin, the biggest cryptocurrency, has faced 477 claims of its demise since its creation over 15 years ago, as per the Bitcoin Obituaries tracker by 99 Bitcoins. Recently, in April, investor Rafi Farber declared Bitcoin "dead," stating its peak occurred in October 2021 during excessive money printing. Farber believes the focus will shift to real money as inflation rises. Bitcoin continues to withstand criticism and keep its dominant position in the market. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: FiscalNote unveils post-election toolkit for government relations & corporate affairs. Washington-based.
news.summary: FiscalNote, a leading provider of government relations and corporate affairs solutions, has unveiled a crucial post-election toolkit for professionals in these fields. The toolkit aims to assist individuals in navigating the changing political landscape and understanding the implications of recent elections. It includes essential resources such as policy updates, analysis of key government decisions, and insights on regulatory changes. This toolkit comes at a time when staying informed and proactive is more important than ever, with significant numbers of professionals relying on such tools to adapt to the evolving political climate.

news.headline: Global cargo airlines market to reach US$296.58 billion by 2034, growing at 6.5% CAGR from 2024. Demand surging due to e-Commerce and medical supply needs. East Asia market projected to grow at 9%, Mexico at 8%, and Japan at 3%. Scheduled airfreight transportation requirements to rise by 3% CAGR until 2034. Oceania market expected to increase by 4% between 2024 and 2034.
news.summary: The global cargo airlines market is expected to reach US$157.2 billion in 2024 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 6.5% from 2024 to 2034. The increase in demand is attributed to the rise of e-Commerce and the need for quick delivery of medical supplies. As industries rely more on airfreight for logistics, cargo aircraft have become essential for maintaining effective supply chains and meeting just-in-time delivery needs. This has led to significant investments in specialized airplanes and handling facilities. By 2034, the global cargo airlines market is estimated to reach US$296.58 billion, with the East Asia market expanding at a CAGR of 9% and Mexico's market growing at a CAGR of 8%. Japan is expected to progress at a CAGR of 3% in East Asia, while scheduled airfreight transportation requirements are anticipated to increase at a CAGR of 3%. The Oceania market is forecasted to rise at a CAGR of 4% between 2024 and 2034. This indicates a fundamental shift in global logistics, emphasizing the importance of flexibility, speed, and dependability to support an increasingly integrated global economy.

news.headline: Fortune's Best Workplaces for Parents have 50% more involved managers; employees report 20% better well-being and 30% faster adaptation to change. CEO emphasizes the importance of a caring and supportive people manager for working parents' success at work and home.
news.summary: The U.S. Surgeon General's advisory on the well-being of working parents highlights the importance of employer support for this demographic. Great Place To Work® analyzed 635,000 employees with parenting responsibilities and found that companies offering better experiences saw clear benefits. At Fortune Best Workplaces for Parents™, 50% more parents reported management involving them in decisions compared to typical workplaces. When parents felt involved, they were 20% more likely to report psychological well-being and 30% more likely to adapt quickly to change. The relationship with their direct manager was crucial in determining if employees felt they had a voice in decision-making. CEO Michael C. Bush emphasized the impact of a supportive manager. The article suggests that these factors contribute to better work-life balance and job satisfaction for working parents.

news.headline: Palm oil-based oleochemicals market to reach US$8.2 billion by 2034, growing at 4.3% CAGR with factors like waste oil adoption contributing to growth.
news.summary: The palm oil-based oleochemicals market is experiencing significant growth, with a projected growth rate of 4.3% from 2024 to 2034. The market was valued at approximately US$ 5.2 billion in 2023 and is expected to reach US$ 8.2 billion by 2034. Factors contributing to this growth include the rise in the adoption of waste vegetable oils, the shift from tallow to palm-based fatty acids, and the increase in palm oil exports. The use of waste vegetable oils is cost-effective and sustainable, leading to increased production of oleochemicals. The shift to palm-based fatty acids is driven by their advantages over tallow, such as higher palmitic acid content and better consistency. The market is further strengthened by the demand for bio-based surfactants and the increase in palm oil exports. The COVID-19 pandemic has also boosted the demand for cleaning products, positively impacting the market.

news.headline: Transposon to present positive results from Phase 2 study of TPN-101 for C9orf72-related ALS/FTD at ALS/MND symposium. Good outcomes on ALSFRS-R, SVC, and biomarkers observed.
news.summary: Administering TPN-101 resulted in positive impacts on important clinical indicators such as the Revised ALS Functional Rating Scale (ALSFRS-R) and Slow Vital Capacity (SVC). Additionally, treatment with TPN-101 led to reductions in critical biomarkers associated with neurodegeneration and neuroinflammation.

news.headline: DeGirum releases hardware-agnostic PySDK to simplify edge AI dev. Focus on vision processing. -Santa Clara, Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: DeGirum®, a company based in Santa Clara, California, unveiled its PySDK, a hardware-agnostic software development kit focused on vision processing for industrial, automotive, and smart retail applications on December 3, 2024. The PySDK is aimed at simplifying AI development at the edge, catering to a wide range of industries. This move showcases DeGirum®'s commitment to advancing edge AI technology and expanding its presence in the market.

news.headline: Reckitt opens largest OTC facility in the US, new factory in NC to produce Mucinex. Acquisition in Wilson, NC to expand manufacturing capacity.
news.summary: A cutting-edge factory in North Carolina is set to manufacture Mucinex® after Reckitt Benckiser Group Plc acquired a pharmaceutical facility in Wilson, NC on December 3, 2024. This acquisition will bolster the company's manufacturing capabilities in the U.S. and mark a significant expansion for Reckitt plc.

news.headline: Keeper Security launches Risk Management Dashboard for security and compliance tracking. Provides real-time risk assessments and dynamic benchmarks.
news.summary: A recently launched Dashboard provides administrators with insights into organizational security practices and compliance status. This tool is backed by dynamic benchmarks and offers real-time risk assessments. The company behind this innovation, Keeper Security, is known for its expertise in zero-trust and zero-knowledge solutions. The launch was announced in Chicago on December 3, 2024.

news.headline: Karyopharm Therapeutics in talks with FDA for endometrial cancer program update. Discuss upcoming meeting.
news.summary: Karyopharm Therapeutics Inc., a pharmaceutical company based in Newton, Massachusetts, revealed on December 3, 2024, that they will be meeting with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA). The company, listed on Nasdaq as KPTI, specializes in innovative cancer treatments. The meeting is part of ongoing discussions between the two parties and signifies a significant step in the regulatory process for the company.

news.headline: Marquardt partners with PlaxidityX for cybersecurity compliance. Global Tier 1 supplier uses PlaxidityX SW product.
news.summary: A major automotive Tier 1 supplier has implemented PlaxidityX SW supply chain security product throughout its product lines. PlaxidityX, an automotive cybersecurity leader based in TEL-AVIV, Israel, announced this partnership on Dec. 3, 2024. The supplier in question is Marquardt, renowned for its mechatronics manufacturing worldwide. This significant development underscores the growing importance of cybersecurity in the automotive industry and highlights the trust placed in PlaxidityX's solutions by key industry players.

news.headline: McDermott reports voting results from Special General Meeting on Dec. 2, 2024. Members approved an increase in authorized share capital.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, McDermott International, Ltd disclosed the outcomes of its Special General Meeting of Members conducted online. The vote resulted in the approval of raising the authorized share capital. Key numbers from the meeting included a notable increase in authorized shares.

news.headline: Red Queen Therapeutics expands licensing agreement with Dana-Farber for pan-influenza program, plans to begin IND-enabling studies.
news.summary: Increased partnership with Dana-Farber Cancer Institute allows for the enhanced advancement of the Red Queen program in combating SARS-CoV-2, with a focus on innovative delivery methods. Additionally, Red Queen has secured patents for its unique pan-influenza therapy. The company aims to commence investigational new drug (IND) preparation studies for this treatment soon.

news.headline: Liza Minnelli's memoir to be adapted for TV by Magnolia Hill Productions and Warner Bros., with collaboration from Michael Feinstein and Sam Haskell.
news.summary: A well-known entertainer is set to join forces with Michael Feinstein and Emmy® Award-winning producer Sam Haskell. On December 3, 2024, Magnolia Hill Productions revealed they have secured the rights to work with the legendary singer, actress, and performer, Liza.

news.headline: Perion partners with a360media, launching retail media tech for premium publishers like Us Weekly, InTouch, with aim to boost revenue.
news.summary: Perion Network Ltd., a technology company listed on NASDAQ and TASE under PERI, has introduced a new retail media offering tailored for publishers. The innovative solution has already been embraced by a360media, a renowned multi-platform media firm managing leading brands like Us Weekly, Life&Style, and inTouch. This platform allows premium publishers to take advantage of retail media budgets, connecting them with advertisers to reach consumers across various digital channels.

news.headline: ZINFI Technologies integrates with HubSpot App Marketplace, enhancing partner management. Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: ZINFI Technologies, Inc., a leading Unified Partner Management (UPM) SaaS platform provider, has unveiled an enhanced integration for HubSpot users. This collaboration, released in the HubSpot App Marketplace, promises to elevate partner relationship management capabilities. The announcement was made from their headquarters in Pleasanton, California on December 3, 2024. This development aims to benefit a wide range of users and signifies the company's commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction.

news.headline: CD&R names Andy Callahan, ex-CEO of Hostess Brands, as Operating Advisor, leveraging his 29 years of executive experience.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Clayton, Dubilier & Rice (CD&R) revealed Andy Callahan as the new Operating Advisor for CD&R funds. Callahan, a seasoned executive with 29 years of experience in the consumer packaged goods sector, joins the firm to offer strategic insights and guidance. The appointment signifies CD&R's focus on leveraging industry expertise for investment success.

news.headline: Moosehead Breweries partners with Porter Airlines, offering flagship beers on all flights, for free.
news.summary: Moosehead Breweries has partnered with Porter Airlines, making them the exclusive beer partner for all flights. The Canadian brewery will offer their popular beers, Moosehead Canadian Lager and Cracked Canoe, on Porter flights starting this week. Passengers can enjoy these drinks for free as part of the airline's premium service. By teaming up with Moosehead, Porter aims to enhance the economy travel experience for all passengers.

news.headline: Analytical study confirms Pharmactive's Abg10+® aged black garlic purity and potency through mass spectrometry.
news.summary: Recent advanced mass spectrometry analysis has verified the authenticity and bioactive compound levels in Pharmactive Biotech Products, SLU's Abg10+® proprietary aged black garlic (ABG). Conducted on December 3, 2024, in Madrid, this study strengthens the credibility of Pharmactive's product. The analysis emphasizes the presence of essential compounds, showcasing the effectiveness of Abg10+®. This development underlines the quality and potency of Pharmactive's ABG product, thus enhancing consumer trust.

news.headline: Videojet launches 7920 UV Laser Marking System in Chicago to enhance usability, adaptability, consistency in coding operations.
news.summary: In Chicago, a new UV laser marking system, the Videojet 7920, has been introduced to enhance ease-of-use, flexibility, and reliability in coding operations. This system aims to provide significant improvements in efficiency and accuracy for businesses that rely on coding processes. The Videojet 7920 offers advanced features and capabilities to streamline operations, making it an ideal choice for companies seeking to optimize their coding operations.

news.headline: Forward Global expands to Miami for US and Latin American market growth, appoints Jose Mallea as managing partner.
news.summary: Jose Mallea has been appointed as the managing partner of Forward Global's Miami office, a well-known international risk management firm. The firm has offices globally and recently launched its new Miami location on December 3, 2024. Mallea, a seasoned business consultant and strategist, will spearhead operations in Miami. This move marks an important expansion for Forward Global, signaling its commitment to the region and reflecting its strategic growth plan.

news.headline: ReposiTrak adds 50 new produce suppliers to traceability network before regulatory deadlines, using hardware-free solutions.
news.summary: In Salt Lake City, 50 produce suppliers have recently teamed up with ReposiTrak to take advantage of its cutting-edge traceability solutions. With regulatory deadlines looming, these suppliers are opting for ReposiTrak's hardware-free technology to streamline their operations.

news.headline: Kinevant Sciences reports Phase 2 study on Namilumab in Chronic Active Pulmonary Sarcoidosis did not show treatment benefit.
news.summary: Kinevant Sciences, a biopharmaceutical company based in BASEL, Switzerland, LONDON, and NEW YORK, shared news on December 03, 2024, regarding their Phase 2 trial results. The study, known as RESOLVE-Lung with identification number NCT05314517, focused on evaluating namilumab's efficacy in treating chronic active pulmonary sarcoidosis. Unfortunately, the trial did not demonstrate any therapeutic benefits for patients with this condition. Namilumab, an experimental anti-GM-CSF monoclonal antibody, was administered through monthly subcutaneous injections. This outcome suggests that further research may be necessary to find effective treatments for this rare inflammatory and autoimmune disease.

news.headline: Positive early data from Phase 1 trial of TERN-701 showed compelling molecular responses at lowest dose level in heavily pre-treated patients with high BCR-ABL transcript levels.
news.summary: Promising molecular reactions were observed even at the lowest dose level in a group of heavily pre-treated patients with elevated baseline BCR-ABL transcript levels. This development demonstrates significant progress in the treatment of such patients.

news.headline: XOi and Davisware enhance partnership to provide contractors with streamlined solutions, improving services.
news.summary: A recent press release detailed the announcement made by XOi, a prominent provider of technology solutions for field service companies, on December 3, 2024, in Nashville, Tennessee. They have revealed the enhancement of their collaboration services to streamline operations and enhance customer service. This initiative is aimed at simplifying tasks and improving overall efficiency for commercial and residential field service companies. XOi is known for its innovative solutions tailored for technicians, with a primary focus on integrating various services. This move is expected to have a significant impact on the industry, as it signifies a strong commitment to improving operational processes.

news.headline: Energous awarded contract with Fortune 10 retailer to upgrade 4,700 retail locations as part of infrastructure optimization.
news.summary: Energous Corporation, operating as Energous Wireless Power Solutions and listed on NASDAQ under WATT, revealed its recent achievement of securing the initial phase of a multi-phase contract with a top Fortune 10 global retailer. This advancement is part of the retailer's nationwide initiative to modernize its infrastructure, involving the enhancement of around 4,700 retail stores in the coming period. Energous, known for its innovative scalable wireless power networks, is set to play a key role in this extensive project initiated by the retailer.

news.headline: Roivant's Phase 2 RESOLVE-Lung study of Namilumab for chronic active pulmonary sarcoidosis failed to show treatment benefit in patients.
news.summary: In Basel, Switzerland, London, and New York, on December 03, 2024, Kinevant Sciences, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focusing on developing medicines for rare inflammatory and autoimmune conditions, disclosed that their Phase 2 trial did not demonstrate therapeutic benefits for individuals with chronic active pulmonary sarcoidosis. The Phase 2 RESOLVE-Lung study (NCT05314517) investigated namilumab, an experimental anti-GM-CSF monoclonal antibody given once a month via subcutaneous injection, in patients with chronic active pulmonary sarcoidosis.

news.headline: Affirm adds new merchant partners for holiday shopping, offering payment options to US consumers.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Affirm (NASDAQ: AFRM) has introduced new merchant partners ahead of the holiday shopping peak, offering US customers the option to pay over time at selected stores. The included partners are: Agape Diamonds for fine jewelry, Discount Tires for auto repairs, Ever/body for cosmetic dermatology treatments, FullBeauty for size-inclusive fashion, Garmin for electronics, and various Hotels. Affirm aims to assist consumers and merchants in driving growth through their payment network.

news.headline: Elicio Therapeutics completes Phase 2 study enrollment with 135 patients, expecting interim analysis of DFS in H1 2025.
news.summary: A Phase 2 randomized trial for ELI-002 has included 135 participants. An official interim evaluation focusing on disease-free survival (DFS) is anticipated to be conducted during the first half of 2025.

news.headline: Nexgen Packaging and Seaman Paper partner to offer eco-friendly solutions to industries, combining Nexgen's order management platform and Seaman's offerings. Creating new paper and plastic-free packaging solutions.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Nexgen Packaging and Seaman announced a collaboration in which Nexgen's worldwide order management platform will merge with Seaman's eco-friendly products to develop an all-encompassing range of packaging solutions without plastic and using paper-based materials. This partnership, based in Chicago and Gardner, Mass., aims to provide sustainable options for consumers and businesses. Nexgen, a prominent global company, is known for its innovative technologies, while Seaman specializes in environmentally friendly offerings. Together, they plan to enhance the market with their joint efforts in creating a comprehensive portfolio of packaging solutions.

news.headline: GigaStar announces DropStars Program, with YouTubers Brian Kim and Tony Gaskins joining as inaugural advisory board members.
news.summary: The dynamic duo of YouTubers Brian Kim and Tony Gaskins have made headlines by becoming the inaugural members of GigaStar's Creator Advisory Board. In a groundbreaking move, the startup GigaStar, which specializes in uniting Creators and Investors, has unveiled its pioneering DropStars Program. This initiative marks the entry of the first pair of Creators into the program, setting the stage for future collaborations and innovations.

news.headline: Predictive Oncology (NASDAQ: POAI) is making progress in exploring strategic alternatives announced on Nov 13, 2024.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Predictive Oncology Inc. (NASDAQ: POAI), a prominent player in AI-based drug discovery, shared advancements in its assessment of strategic options initiated on November 13, 2024, in Pittsburgh.
